targets.rawSql: SELECT day AS time, sum AS "TRIMP" FROM daily_metrics WHERE metric = 'workout_trimp' AND $__timeFilter(day::timestamptz) ORDER BY day
SELECT day AS time, sum AS "Strength" FROM daily_metrics WHERE metric = 'workout_trimp_strength' AND $__timeFilter(day::timestamptz) ORDER BY day
SELECT day AS time, sum AS "Walking" FROM daily_metrics WHERE metric = 'workout_trimp_walking' AND $__timeFilter(day::timestamptz) ORDER BY day
SELECT day AS time, sum AS "Cycling" FROM daily_metrics WHERE metric = 'workout_trimp_cycling' AND $__timeFilter(day::timestamptz) ORDER BY day
SELECT day AS time, avg AS "HRV (ms)" FROM daily_metrics WHERE metric = 'heart_rate_variability' AND $__timeFilter(day::timestamptz) ORDER BY day
SELECT day AS time, vmin AS "Resting HR (bpm)" FROM daily_metrics WHERE metric = 'resting_heart_rate' AND $__timeFilter(day::timestamptz) ORDER BY day
SELECT day AS time, avg AS "HR Recovery (bpm)" FROM daily_metrics WHERE metric = 'cardio_recovery' AND $__timeFilter(day::timestamptz) ORDER BY day

SELECT DATE(start_time AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Vienna') AS "Date", name AS "Type", ROUND((duration_s/60)::numeric,0) AS "Duration (min)", ROUND(active_energy_kcal::numeric,0) AS "Energy (kcal)", ROUND(avg_hr::numeric,0) AS "Avg HR (bpm)", ROUND(distance_km::numeric,2) AS "Distance (km)" FROM workouts WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time) ORDER BY start_time DESC

SELECT ref_date AS "Date", kind AS "Kind", note AS "Note", ROUND(severity::numeric,2) AS "Severity" FROM findings WHERE kind IN ('training_load','recovery_alert') AND ref_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' ORDER BY ref_date DESC
